meaning: Catholic Youth Organization (美国)天主教青年组织
examples: Many supporters are rallying around Caroline in her quest to play co-ed CYO football.
Specifically, effective this upcoming 2013 Fall season, the Archdiocese will allow for co-ed participation in CYO football.
The Archdiocese conceded and permitted Pla to finish the season, but said after that no more CYO football for her.
